summary:
POLITICAL AND GEOPOLITICAL VISIONS: Brandon describes experiencing various visions centered around Donald Trump, claiming to have foreseen plots designed to cause distractions and physical harm during the former president's birthday and leading up to the Fourth of July. He outlines a conspiracy involving international leaders, characterizing Emmanuel Macron and Volodymyr Zelensky as deceptive figures and alleging that aid to Ukraine is being diverted into slush funds and secret biolabs. Furthermore, Brandon recounts visions of financial elites conspiring to establish a digital one-world currency and a new global order, asserting that Trump currently stands as the primary obstacle to these plans.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon details a series of impending attacks on United States infrastructure, warning of potential sabotage to water systems, electrical grids, and emergency communication networks across major cities like New York, Philadelphia, and Boston. He describes graphic visions of heavily armored dump trucks and train derailments orchestrated by an internal enemy, likening the scenario to a coordinated mass casualty event. Additionally, he claims to have anticipated recently reported law enforcement arrests regarding drone and sniper plots, viewing these developments as validation of his ongoing warnings about a domestic uprising and infrastructural vulnerabilities.

INTERNATIONAL CONFLICTS AND ALLIANCES: Brandon shares his perspectives on global military escalations, expressing deep concern over a potential major conflict emerging from economic instability within the Eurozone. He shares visions of an impending alliance between Russia, Turkey, and Syria, warning that Turkish forces will eventually move against Israel and block strategic waterways in the Black Sea. His commentary also includes references to the deployment of unconventional weapons in Europe, specifically mentioning potential strikes on Warsaw and the anticipated transfer of long-range missiles from France to Ukraine.

NATURAL DISASTERS AND HEALTH CRISES: Brandon recounts visions of severe environmental and medical catastrophes, including a devastating underwater volcanic eruption near the Oregon coast that he claims will trigger a massive tsunami and result in significant casualties in British Columbia. He attributes recent major earthquakes in Indonesia and China to a divine shaking. Furthermore, Brandon details his focus on a recent Ebola outbreak in Africa, describing how intercessory prayers were directed at halting the disease's spread and sparking a profound spiritual revival among local populations.

CULTURAL EVENTS AND TARGETED ASSASSINATIONS: Brandon outlines threats targeting upcoming American celebrations, specifically warning of explosive devices and gas-related hazards orchestrated around Fourth of July events, Mardi Gras in New Orleans, and large fireworks displays. He claims to have foreseen highly specific assassination plots involving sniper rifles and biological venom targeting prominent conservative figures, including Donald Trump, Marco Rubio, and Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, prompting him to pray for their supernatural protection. Additionally, Brandon discusses his spiritual support for Mel Gibson's upcoming sequel to The Passion of the Christ, asserting that his specific prayers for the film's funding and script development will eventually lead to widespread revival in global movie theaters.
rawData: [June 17, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/HhKfSxKL67I]-[Sorry we're late. X is down and the internet was giving us trouble. Our camera wasn't charged. I told Braden, I said, 'Well, we have a little bit of a delay, but that's all right. We're here.' So, we're going to pray and we'll go over what was seen in the news. Oh, the camera got moved. Son, is it okay? It got moved. Like that? Yeah. Is it okay? Yep. Okay. You sure? Sorry. Did I bump it? There's already 15 here. Let's just get started. We're late anyway. Well, good evening family. Thank you for joining me again tonight. Wow. I have to say last night, if you were not a part of the prayer time—now, the beginning, I love the news articles, but when the glory comes in and I feel the presence of the Lord like I did last night, I think it was probably one of my top prayer times that I've had this year for sure. After it was over, I didn't want to leave it. The presence of the Lord was so strong. I could feel it all through the room and all through my house, and it's just so refreshing. And as you spend time like that at the feet of the Father, there's nothing like it. There's nothing like Him. Life-changing. One touch from the Lord will change your life forever. One touch from the Father. I'm cold again, so I turned off the fan. Diana got me a new fan that has buttons so I don't have to have him get up, so I can push the button, and when I get hot, I can put it on myself. So I was like, 'Wow.' She got it for me for Father's Day. So I said, 'Look at that, baby. Thank you.' She goes, 'You can push this button and I turn my fan on and I can turn my fan off.' I know the simple things, but I get excited about it. Well, where do we start? Okay, we'll start with this. The Lord showed us time and time again to pray over the 14th, that there were plots and plans against Trump on his birthday. And I kept, you know, when you see in part and you hear in part, you don't know what you're seeing. A lot of times I just keep praying into it. Praying whatever the Lord has for you, and it's like Diana said, the Lord doesn't give you the whole puzzle. You do one piece at a time. We talk about it all the time. He doesn't give you the whole picture a lot of times, Brandon. He gives you a piece. It says, 'Pray over this. There are things about the 14th.' I said, 'The 14th was highlighted.' And I saw the Lord circling. He said, 'Pray about the 14th and Trump's birthday for his 80th birthday. Distractions are coming. Pray for his safety. Pray for him. Pray for these No Kings rallies. Pray for New York.' And I saw fires. I saw the new Steven Spielberg movie coming out and the aliens and talking about the 'Alien Files.' And they released that on the 13th. And they had those people in those red outfits with the blonde hair, and it was really creepy. 100 million people, 17,000 shares. It went viral in just a couple minutes and I thought, 'Is this it?' But I still felt there was something wrong, but I couldn't really put my finger on it. So, I just prayed over it. And when really the fire in New York with the bus, I was like, 'Okay, that's kind of a big deal, I guess.' You know, if you live in New York, but it's not really a big distraction. And it's just people being stupid. But I just kept praying and then when I saw he was going to the G7 summit and I saw him around Emmanuel Macron, and what the Lord has told me to pray about this going clear into tomorrow, he comes home on Wednesday. Praying over his safety, praying over him as he is there and he departs around Pinocchio, you know, with the cocaine-snorting Pinocchio Zelenskyy. And the Lord said—I saw him again walking around with Macron, and I said, 'This guy is a mole. He is a weasel.' And I saw that Emmanuel Macron is a weasel and that Zelenskyy is a Pinocchio, and he is a puppet. And here he was, as I told you all, what I saw about the billions of dollars that we've given them in aid. A lot of it went to slush funds to fund corruption. And I saw biolabs. I saw biolabs for things that were very dark in Ukraine. I saw secret missions with gold. And I saw there was a lot of evil over this area. For how long now? It seems like for over a year, two years going on, right? I mean, time flies, doesn't it? So this morning, my dad texted me and he said, 'Did you see this?' And it was early this morning. And look at this right here. Do you have it? 'FBI Reveals alleged plot to attack White House, UFC event, and more top headlines.' Okay, they were going to use—'FBI breaks up alleged drone attack plot targeting White House, UFC event,' Fox News. They were going to use these drones to cause mass casualties over his birthday party. And the Lord kept putting his face before me. 'Pray over his birthday party. Pray over his birthday party.' And without getting flaky and adding to or taking away from anything because it's real easy to do—add to, take away from you—you don't put your own thought. Whatever wherever the Holy Spirit is leading you to do is what you do. You just are led by the Spirit. For those that are led by the Spirit of God are the sons and daughters of God. You are led by the Spirit of God. You don't get flaky and try to add your part to it. Why do you need to do that? You just follow the Holy Ghost. And so, you know, I try really hard as a leader of all these people to just flow, but I know what I saw and I know it was accurate. And the Lord said, 'Keep praying over this.' And I didn't let it go. I prayed all day. I prayed Saturday. I took off and I prayed and prayed and prayed Saturday and I prayed over it for Sunday. And then we had—He said, 'I want you to do a video Sunday.' So, we did Sunday. And so, 'Group planned to attack White House, UFC event using snipers and drones,' FBI says. And then, I don't remember, the FBI Director said we just averted a major mass casualty event. We just averted this. It was in Twitter, it was in X, and they were talking about it in the news, and all these news people were talking about things, right? So, the Lord said to watch from his birthday on into the 4th of July, for there's many more planned things like this concerning our water, concerning our electric grid. I'm going to go over these things with you because this is how serious I feel it is, even today as I pray. Our substations for our power plants, causing major power outages for up to three weeks plus in major cities: Philadelphia, I saw New York, and even smaller towns trying to cause disruption in 9-1-1 services. And we've seen it. Do you have those, baby? Yeah. Okay. This is so important because this is what the Lord—I know, baby, you don't have to rush. I'm throwing these things at you. Here's the 'California water system hit by Iran hackers. Terrifying threat to drinking supply.' I said this is bad. People get sick with drinking that water if they didn't filter it right. I guarantee you it's bad when you do filter it. Especially in California. I guarantee you. And so they keep recycling the water. They just—it goes down the toilet and they pull it back and they just keep cleaning it and using it and cleaning it and using it and it's nasty. And that's what they do in Dallas for work too, I think. And a lot of these other cities, probably even Oklahoma City, I don't know. It's filthy, gross. But so I saw these attacks with trains—derailing trains with explosive devices on the tracks and the Lord said pray over the trains for big—it looked like propane tankers, looked like propane tanks, you know, like you have out in the country. You have a 250-gallon propane tank. I saw that now. I saw that they would interfere—sorry, my neck—I saw that they would interfere with the 9-1-1 communications. If everybody remembers and you follow me, I spoke specifically about cell phones and cell phone towers—AT&T and stuff like that. You couldn't call because they were overloaded with some kind of an attack. I saw SIM cards and things like that which they busted back on September 23, 2025. And the Lord said to pray over 9/11 when there was a major event that took place in Boston. As I was praying over the hospital with the major cross on it, at the Red Cross, I saw red. Pray over this area and then Fenway Park. I believe it's Fenway, right? I see so many different things, y'all. I don't want to get it all confused, but it was a park where the Boston Red Sox play. Pray over this. Pray over parades. Pray over major gatherings for parades and firework displays for the 250th anniversary. This is what I'm talking about when they busted this on September 23rd. When we prayed over it, the Lord highlighted September 23rd for us for months. We prayed over it and prayed over it, and it was about the UN; Benjamin went to the UN and everybody walked out on him. All that happened back then—remember, almost a year ago—and they found all these SIM cards in New York and all the disruption to overload the 911 system. And the Lord said, 'It is not just here. There's one in Chicago. There's one in Seattle. And it goes across the nation.' I saw certain cities that had these. Then we found out that they were making them in the back of a car to disrupt your stuff, with more sophisticated tech. This was very serious. And so the Lord said, 'Watch concerning this: over 100,000 SIM cards.' This was a multi-million dollar operation, right? Well, the Lord said, 'There's more of it, and they're not done.' And this was back in September. I said, 'Y'all, remember Timothy McVeigh? Remember what happened? I saw fertilizer in the back of vans. I saw fertilizer in big dump trucks. I saw massive events planned with dump trucks that were armor-piercing. They had welded steel plates all around the tires and all around the fronts of these dump trucks so that they were impenetrable by major artillery like shooting them. They could go a long way with them trying to disassemble these trucks. They had battering rams at the front of these trucks to run them through crowds and police barricades. They had made trucks look like something out of a movie and the tires were impenetrable. They made it where they are blocked by anybody trying to shoot their tires out.' I saw all this in visions. I keep praying over it. I still see it, but I don't talk about it. You know, some parts you give it to folks and you let them pray over it, and then some things I felt to rehearse. And tonight I felt to rehearse it to tell you what the Lord is showing me concerning a Red Dawn experience in our nation—an enemy within, a new D-Day trying to bring forth this event. President Trump is saying a lot of stuff. I'm concerned about some of what I'm hearing; I'm praying for him. The Lord said to pray for his mind and that he takes no counsel from the ungodly. Praying over his decisions. I saw it's midterm and he's getting desperate because we're getting closer to midterms. These are elections that are very serious. And here we see the two bozos, just like the Lord warned me, that Macron and Zelenskyy will be friends. Macron was being a puppet master to Zelenskyy, and his nose was growing as he was snorting coke. Look, they're hanging out just like the Lord showed us back this time last year—January or February. And the Lord said, 'Watch this alliance that's coming.' Good, X is working again. We need Elon. This is very serious. This is a prophetic word and a prophetic vision. These are warnings that the Lord is telling us to pray about. We're seeing it in the news; we saw this months ago and now it's happening. And the Lord said a great distraction and a black swan event to raise up war in Europe—World War II with a Hitler-type spirit. Because the euro is in trouble; the money system in Europe is in trouble. And I saw bankers—George and other people who were big money people. George was one of them, talking directly to Lucifer, Satan. They were having meetings with the devil; he would appear before these bankers in the visions. They were trying to cause a One World Order, one world currency—digital. How do we do this? The dollar's in the way. Trump's in the way. He is a log in the road, a massive oak tree in the road to their plans to bring forth the digital One World Order, digital ID, and social credit scores. He's the log in the road, the Lord said, for right now. And the Lord said you'll be so thankful that you had him in the days ahead because if we had Kamala Harris, you'd be in trouble. Look at them, they're all buddies. This is what the Lord told us. We want to disarm and stop.' And I said no, this is what we saw. Maybe they'll come out with a peace agreement. I would love to be wrong concerning war. It would be wonderful. I saw lavender on the fields and the people of Russia and Ukraine praying for peace. They're losing 20,000 people a month, is what President Trump said today. 20,000 people a month are being lost—sons, husbands, grandfathers—it's needless. What's Carney saying? He's talking about sanctions on Russia. So he's joining up with the brotherhood. I told you Carney will start to come out. Are you pro-Russia, Brandon? No, I'm pro-not-war. And then I saw snipers on buildings in Miami. Call them directly. Right? So, I believe this is on purpose. This isn't normal. So, we will continue to pray. That's what we're here for. So, it encouraged me that our FBI had it together and we stopped these idiots from trying to cause mass casualties with snipers and drones trying to hurt these people at President Trump's birthday party. And than the world names what we have now but otherwise we will not have enough otherwise Europe will not have enough otherwise the Middle East will not have enough. I don't know about Asia, I don't know their needs what they want and etc. But I'm talking about the countries whom I know personally, what I know their needs. Syria, you know, he's pulled that country together amazingly quickly. He's very capable. And he's been very good for me. He's protected everything that I've asked for, he's done. And if Israel can't do the job without killing everyone else, he'll do the job. Syria will do the job. Okay, next. It was a country where you had professors, doctors, lawyers. The great intellect was in Lebanon. Now it's just it's terrible. Are you frustrated with Netanyahu? No. We had a great relationship. We're talking about some end details. I didn't like that he did an attack based on a, you know, there was a very minor little thing with some drones that were released and he ends up doing a very... I saw that attack. I saw where that bomb went. Did you see what happened? That was a vicious, that was too much. You know, you can do too much also. But we've had a very effective relationship. Without us, without the United States, there would be no Israel. What would a Ukraine deal look like? Well, we have one, but we had a good meeting. I'm meeting him later on, too. We had a very good meeting. Look, Russia should make a deal. Russia's lost tremendous amounts of people, and so is Ukraine. Last month they lost 35,000 soldiers between the two of them. On a monthly basis they averaged 25,000 people, mostly soldiers. That's a lot of people. 25,000 plus a month die in this war. He kind of stands alone, don't he? He knows who all of them are. He's like, I'm not going to go around anymore. It's like he saw he had his back to all of them. And look, there's the lady at Italy. There's Modi. Yeah. And then there's the Japan, is it Germany? He's like, I'm not going to talk to any of y'all. This is UK. I don't know who some of these people are. I don't know who that man is. Interesting. Okay. Yeah. So, what was it about that that was interesting to me? Here he is. He's begging for money again. Would you give us money? Please help us. All right. What I'm concerned about is when he starts back in Syria and saying that they're better after that man was a brutal murderer of Christians and was a radical Islamic man, the head of Syria, and he's saying, well, if he does, he's done everything what that we've asked him to do. Well, that don't make you good. And the problem that I have is I've seen Turkey and Syria in the days ahead and I saw a planned attack with people with red hats on marching out of Syria and Turkey in the days ahead. And they were all like ground troop invasion is coming from Turkey. And I saw red hats. And when this happened, the United States wasn't there. And the Lord said, 'Ezekiel 38 and 39 are at the door. The hook in the jaw.' We're about to see something that is of biblical proportions, based on what we know the Word says. Ezekiel 38 and 39 are coming. And I've asked Miss Billie about it, Sister Billie and them, about the Rapture—is it before or after and all that. And I'm still trying to figure it all out, y'all. You know, people like Rick Renner and Perry Stone, those guys, they know the Word when it comes to the Tribulation and Revelation, and they've got it dissected and digested and spit up again like a cow. It's amazing to listen to some of these people when it comes to the Word like that. The Book of Revelation is one that I go, 'Wow,' you know, and Daniel, and mixing it all together to see where we are. And I just know what the Holy Spirit has told me inside. I know people go, 'Brandon, you say things and you say we're the generation that won't taste death. Is that you saying that or is that the Lord saying that?' No, that came out of prayer. And you know what it came out of? I was concerned about my little girl, and I was sitting before Him one day and I said, 'Lord, Megan is overcoming.' I said, 'I'm getting older and my wife's getting older, and I know You know this.' I'm just having my conversation with Him. I said, 'Should I have some kind of fund for her, a GoFundMe or something?' Back whenever I was living across from my grandmother, I said, 'I don't know what we're going to do to supply for her in the days ahead. I don't know what to do and I don't want to be in worry about this, but she's getting older. We're all getting older here.' You're always thinking as a good father, 'If I die and my wife dies, what's going to happen with my child who can't talk or bathe herself or do all these things?' And so I was going over that and the Lord said to me, 'Brandon, you're not going to have to worry about that. You will be the generation that does not taste death.' And I stopped and I just started weeping because whenever I heard it, it was that clear. That's where I got that from. I was in great intercessory prayer for my daughter. And He said, 'Brandon, you will be the generation that doesn't—your generation will not taste death.' And I grabbed onto it. When people say, 'Where does that come from?' that's where that came from. It came out of a lot of pain. And when He warned me about it, I had peace and I've clung to that ever since. 'You will be the generation that will not taste death. I'm coming. Jesus is standing at the door.' And that's why I'm so dogmatic about it, to keep saying it from the mountaintops, to warn you of what I've heard in my own private prayer time. And I want to always have an urgency in your heart that you realize that we're running out of time. Jesus Christ is coming. If you truly have a relationship with Him, you can sense it. You can feel the pulse of it in the Spirit in intercessory prayer. And that's why I don't try to call myself a prophetic voice. I mean, I have people call me and say, 'Hey, prophet, how are you doing?' I don't get caught up in all those names: apostles, pastors, and all that. If you're a pastor and you lead people, praise God. I have a church here. This is my online church; I call it my prayer church group, and I'm so thankful for every single one of you that come out. I would love to have four walls if the Lord would allow me to and to open a building. I've had people want me to do that, but I don't know what that would look like for me. All I know is that God said, 'I want you to do this right now.' And it won't always be like this, but there will be a day when He says 'don't.' And when that day happens, I'll let you know. But until then, I occupy with what He told me to do until He comes. And so, I'm thankful for every single one of you. My goal is to raise up a million men and women prayer army, to have the largest prayer group in the world, and in doing so, we'll change the nations by prayer. I truly believe that prayer changes things. And as I was praying last night, I saw what I saw. It changed my life. I saw the throne, high and lifted up. A whirlwind of fire. And I saw two massive angels on both the right and left, and they had massive wings that were covering their faces. They could not look at Him. They were covering their faces with their wings. The glory of the Lord was so strong. And I could feel the presence. I felt like I was going to melt as I was looking at it. And I just kept—it made me weep as I was looking. And I could feel the presence of the Lord as I started. I said, 'Lord, what do You want me to pray about?' Now, I know I might be skipping around here, but He wanted me to pray over the people in Africa for the Ebola virus. And I saw people dying by the truckloads from the Ebola virus. I saw young people. And He said, 'It's not your time. Go back and give an account of what you've seen.' And I saw people being raised from the dead in Africa. I saw people that had gone to hell. I saw witch doctors that had weird things in their noses and their hair looked really nasty and ratty. They died and went to hell and God brought them back out of mercy, and I saw them giving an account. And they had great influence in the African tribes and communities. These witch doctors did. They had great influence, and when they gave an account of when they went to hell, they got born again and they started witnessing to the people all throughout Africa. And I saw people getting born again by the tens of thousands from these voodoo people, these African tribal men that were witch doctors, who gave their hearts to Jesus Christ when they came back from hell. And the Lord showed me to come against that Ebola virus, and we were praying over the people. And as we prayed, I saw a dissipating of this. As we were praying to stop the spread of Ebola in Africa today, Braden said, 'Today there were more casualties so far in the Ebola virus than they've had.' So of any day, today was the highest death count rate. So we are praying against this. The DRC reports record numbers of Ebola cases in a single day as the outbreak hits the one-month mark. That happened today, and the Lord had us praying over that. And so, I believe we made great ground concerning Africa and stopping this Ebola spread. I saw great revival coming to them. As I saw the rain begin to fall, I saw the glory coming on Africa and a shaking started to happen around the world. He said, 'It's time for the floodgates to open.' And I saw the floodgates begin to open. I saw the water begin to flow. Major rivers of revival are going to start to flow. And I saw a shaking of these nations: Africa, Asia. The Lord had me praying over that. Then we saw—praying over Africa—I saw it was mainly about Ebola last night, praying over Ebola and the glory. I could feel the presence of the Lord. And then He brought out the passing by. He said, 'My goodness will pass by you, My mercy in another wave.' And I saw when Moses—He got the scripture out. He said, 'Show me Your glory.' And He held him in the cleft of the rock. And as the Lord passed, He said, 'I'll not allow you to see My face.' But as he passed by, his goodness and his mercy, the Lord said, "It is the goodness of God that brings man to repentance."
